title: pulmonaria × intermedia
intro: Pulmonaria × intermedia, a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Pulmonaria officinalis and Pulmonaria mollis, is a type of flowering perennial plant commonly used in gardens for its attractive foliage and vibrant flowers. The medicinal properties of Pulmonaria × intermedia lie in its leaves, which contain compounds such as pulmonarin and isopulmonarin, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve coughs and colds, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Pulmonaria × intermedia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory conditions.
